mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'PAID', paid_at = NOW() WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx}
UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'SHIPPED', shipped_at = NOW() WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx}
UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_at = NOW(), is_settled = 'Y' WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} ORDER BY order_regdate DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE seller_idx = #{sellerIdx} ORDER BY order_regdate DESC
